title: 7 schoolboys die in horror KZN crash
description: NATIONAL NEWS AND VIDEO - A horrific head-on...
bodyText:
Video

NATIONAL NEWS AND VIDEO - A horrific head-on collision between a truck and a car transporting schoolchildren on the N2 near Mandeni in KZN claimed the lives of seven high school boys and their driver (39) early this morning.


> IPSS Medical Rescue’s Samantha Meyrick says the truck driver sustained critical injuries and was rushed to hospital.


The highway between bridges 18 and 19 had to be closed in both directions and is expected to be opened soon.

Watch: Video of residents looting the truck that was involved in the accident:

Read original story on www.citizen.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
